overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a lantern exploring a stormy forest at night. The character navigates through dense woods, rocky terrain, and past a wooden cabin during heavy rainfall with occasional lightning.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest with ferns and tall pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense forest holding a lantern to light the way

dense green ferns covering the forest floor
large rocks and boulders scattered among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense forest at night during a heavy storm, holding a lantern that illuminates the ferns and tall pine trees surrounding the narrow dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with large boulder formations

events.description: terrain transitions from forest floor to rocky boulder field

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through large rocks and boulders

entered.detail: massive moss-covered boulders blocking the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the dense fern-covered forest into a rockier area with large boulder formations, continuing to hold the lantern to navigate the uneven gravel terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cabin in forest clearing during thunderstorm

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the sky behind the cabin

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling a wooden cabin with lantern held high

entered.detail: small rustic wooden cabin with porch and chimney
old wooden cart with large wheels beside the cabin

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a clearing and approaches a rustic wooden cabin as lightning strikes in the background, illuminating the stormy sky. An old wooden wagon sits beside the cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail leaving the cabin area

events.description: leaving the cabin clearing and returning to forest path

agents.ego_description: walking away from the cabin along a winding dirt path

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the cabin behind and continues along a winding forest path, with the lantern casting light on the dirt trail ahead as the heavy rain continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a storm-lashed forest that transitions from dense woodland into a rocky clearing before returning to a winding trail. It begins with the character navigating a narrow dirt path, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow over thick ferns and towering pine trees amidst heavy rain. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows the character from the lush greenery into a rugged area defined by large boulder formations and uneven gravel. The scene then opens into a clearing where the character approaches a rustic wooden cabin and an old wagon, just as a flash of lightning momentarily illuminates the dark, stormy sky. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they leave the cabin behind, moving back into the woods along a winding dirt path under the persistent downpour.
